[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 001010100 3

01 001000000 1
12 001111101 6
23 111010110 6
34 111011100 6
45 000010000 1
56 000110000 2
67 011100001 4
70 011110110 6

02 111000010 4
13 001010100 3 match 7
